title: Find a document workflow
description: Browse practical .NET and PowerShell patterns, then inspect the source and real output before choosing a package.

featured.title: Database data to a finished report
featured.description: Query SQL Server with DbaClientX, turn the results into Excel or CSV, and verify the round trip with PSWriteOffice.

cards.image_alt: Rendered slide showing the selected PowerPoint design brief
cards.title: Branded presentation deck
cards.description: Compose editable slides from a design brief, data, charts, notes, and reusable layouts.
cards.proof: The committed preview comes from the PowerPoint design-brief example and is paired with package validation and preflight guidance.

cards.image_alt: First page of a generated professional PDF report
cards.title: Professional PDF report
cards.description: Build page-aware reports with headings, tables, charts, headers, footers, and reusable layout components.
cards.proof: This page image is the committed Poppler rendering baseline for the professional report visual test.

cards.image_alt: Rendered Excel range with formatted data and visual styling
cards.title: Operational Excel workbook
cards.description: Write typed data, tables, formulas, formatting, charts, and print-ready report ranges.
cards.proof: The preview is a committed Excel image-export baseline, so the visible workbook range is inspectable in the test corpus.

cards.title: Data-driven architecture diagram
cards.description: Create editable VSDX diagrams from inventory or topology data, then export a preview for review.
cards.proof: The preview is the native Visio cloud-architecture visual baseline generated by the diagram-builder tests.

cards.image_alt: Generated invoice converted from HTML to PDF
cards.title: HTML invoice to PDF
cards.description: Parse HTML with bounded resource policy and turn web content into a finished PDF artifact.
cards.proof: The preview is the committed native HTML invoice rendering baseline from the PDF converter tests.

cards.title: Multi-format extraction pipeline
cards.description: Detect and extract normalized text, tables, visuals, assets, metadata, and hierarchical chunks across document families.
cards.proof: The Reader baseline covers 25 cases across 14 formats and retains runtime, machine, detection, and validation context.

cards.image_alt: Generated Word report rendered as PDF
cards.title: Word report with PDF delivery
cards.description: Build a DOCX report, validate its package, and produce a PDF delivery artifact through the focused converter.
cards.proof: The shown page is the committed native Word-report PDF baseline, tied to the converter test source.

cards.title: Offline notebook export
cards.description: Read or create native OneNote pages, then export selected pages to image, HTML, Markdown, PDF, or Reader results.
cards.proof: The guide links each conversion to its owning package and uses the same Drawing canvas for visual PDF and image export.
